features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.description: The warlock chooses a patron and gains a variety of powers from that patron.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: The warlock gains the ability to cast spells from their spellbook.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.description: The warlock gains a bonus feature from their patron.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: The warlock increases one of their ability scores by 2, or by 1 if they already have two scores at 18 or higher.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron feature
features.description: The warlock gains an additional power from their patron.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: The warlock increases one of their ability scores by 2, or by 1 if they already have two scores at 18 or higher.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron feature
features.description: The warlock gains an additional power from their patron.

features.name: Mystic Areanum (6th level)
features.description: The warlock can cast a 6th-level spell using their spell slots.

features.name: Mystic Areanum (7th level)
features.description: The warlock can cast a 7th-level spell using their spell slots.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron feature
features.description: The warlock gains an additional power from their patron.

features.name: Mystic Areanum (8th level)
features.description: The warlock can cast an 8th-level spell using their spell slots.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: The warlock increases one of their ability scores by 2, or by 1 if they already have two scores at 18 or higher.

features.name: Mystic Areanum (9th level)
features.description: The warlock can cast a 9th-level spell using their spell slots.

features.name: Rage
features.description: On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging, you gain +2 to Str and Con, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from non-magical attacks, and can't be frightened or charmed

features.name: Primal Path
features.description: At 2nd level, you choose a Primal Path. This grants you features at 2nd level and every three levels thereafter.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.description: At 1st level, you gain a feature from your patron. The available features are determined by the patron itself.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: Starting at 2nd level, you learn an eldritch invocation of your patron's school of magic. You can learn one additional invocation of that school when you reach 6th level in this class, another at 10th level, and a final one at 14th level.

features.name: Invocations of the Archfey
features.description: At 3rd level, you gain the ability to summon fey beings as part of your patron's service. These beings can be used for various purposes, such as delivering messages or providing guidance.

features.name: Eldritch Aegis
features.description: Starting at 6th level, you can use an action to cast the shield spell on yourself as a reaction when you are hit by an attack.

features.name: Warlock Marks
features.description: At 10th level, your patron grants you a mark that causes damage to any creature that hits you with a melee weapon attack. This damage is equal to half your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier.

features.name: Eldritch Mastery
features.description: At 14th level, you gain the ability to focus on mastering one aspect of your patron's magic, allowing you to cast spells from their school more effectively.
